description: Set the background node velocity or fluid velocity, if specified, and fix the quantity. If fixing velocity, node motion is constant in the specified directions. It is recommended that mpoints extend into the fixed node region.

keywords.name: fluid-velocity-x
keywords.description: Fix the \(x\) -component of the fluid velocity.

keywords.name: fluid-velocity-y
keywords.description: Fix the \(y\) -component of the fluid velocity.

keywords.name: fluid-velocity-z
keywords.description: Fix the \(z\) -component of the fluid velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: Fix the \(x\) -component of the translational velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: Fix the \(y\) -component of the translational velocity.

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: Fix the \(z\) -component of the translational velocity.
